description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Get Disabled Computers: One-click toolbar button to find all disabled computer accounts on computer management page.
- Get Empty Groups: One-click toolbar button to find all groups with no members on groups management page.
- Export: User, Computer, and Group Management export now supports CSV, Excel, and PDF.
- Column picker for Computer Management: Toggle Last Logon, When Created, When Changed columns
- Column picker for Group Management: Toggle Email, Managed By, When Created, When Changed columns
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Grid settings now persist between sessions across all three management pages - column visibility, widths, and order are remembered
- Computer Management toolbar renamed to Bulk Operations with a dropdown (Delete, Disable, Enable, Move) matching the style of other management pages
- Group Management Bulk Operations dropdown cleaned up - Create Single Group removed since it has its own dedicated toolbar button
